name: Cohere
tagline: Generate, embed, and rerank text with Cohere models
description: Use Cohere's v2 API for conversational generation, semantic embeddings, and document reranking. Requires a Cohere API key sent as a bearer token.

auth.hint: Create a Cohere API key in the dashboard and send it as Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>.

tools.name: create_chat
tools.description: Generate an assistant response from chronological user, assistant, system, or tool messages and return content, finish reason, and token usage.

params.name: messages
params.description: Chronological user, assistant, system, or tool messages.

params.name: max_tokens
params.description: Maximum output tokens, capped by the selected model's limit.

params.name: temperature
params.description: Non-negative sampling temperature; the reference documents a default of 0.3.

params.name: stream
params.description: Return server-sent streaming events when true; defaults to false.

tools.name: rerank_documents
tools.description: Rank supplied documents by relevance to a query and return their indexes and relevance scores in descending order.

params.name: model
params.description: Rerank model identifier, for example rerank-v4.0-pro.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query used to rank the documents.

params.name: documents
params.description: Texts to compare with the query; the reference recommends no more than 1,000 documents per request.

params.name: top_n
params.description: Maximum number of ranked results to return; must be at least 1.

tools.name: create_embeddings
tools.description: Convert text or image inputs into embeddings for semantic search, classification, clustering, and retrieval.

params.name: model
params.description: Embedding model identifier, for example embed-v4.0.

params.name: inputs
params.description: Text or image inputs to embed in the structure documented for the selected model.

params.name: input_type
params.description: Purpose of the embeddings, such as classification, search_document, or search_query when supported.

params.name: embedding_types
params.description: Requested vector representations, such as float.
